name: rss-to-x-bot
description: Generate a transformed RSS feed for IFTTT -> X automation.

scripts.test: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/fetch-feed.js && node --check src/extract-article.js && node --check src/generate-x-post.js && node --check src/transform-post.js && node --check src/build-rss.js
